query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS organizations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  logo_url TEXT,
  primary_color VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#0a7ea4',
  subscription_tier ENUM('starter', 'professional', 'enterprise', 'custom') DEFAULT 'professional',
  subscription_status ENUM('active', 'trial', 'suspended', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'trial',
  trial_ends_at DATETIME,
  billing_email VARCHAR(255),
  max_users INT DEFAULT 25,
  settings JSON,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_slug (slug),
  INDEX idx_status (subscription_status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS organizations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  logo_url TEXT,
  primary_color VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#0a7ea4',
  subscription_tier ENUM('starter', 'professional', 'enterprise', 'custom') DEFAULT 'professional',
  subscription_status ENUM('active', 'trial', 'suspended', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'trial',
  trial_ends_at DATETIME,
  billing_email VARCHAR(255),
  max_users INT DEFAULT 25,
  settings JSON,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_slug (slug),
  INDEX idx_status (subscription_status)
);
